📋 Executive Summary


EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: CANADA-BRAZIL TRADE ANALYSIS (2024-2025)
================================================================================

1. TRADE PERFORMANCE OVERVIEW
• Total trade changed by 16.0% ($1,993,594,613)
• Trade balance shifted by $-713,053,291
• SIGNIFICANT CHANGE: Trade volume changed by more than 10% between 2024 and 2025, indicating a major shift in bilateral trade relations.
• 9 provinces showed growth, 3 showed decline

2. TOP PERFORMERS
• Fastest growing province: Nunavut (246.6%)
• Top growing product: Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations (212.2%)
• Key growth driver: Ontario (contributed 68.8% of total growth)

3. MARKET SHARE HIGHLIGHTS
• Largest market share (2025): Ontario (49.9%)
• Most improved market share: Ontario (+3.0 pp)
• Top 3 provinces control 92.4% of market

4. 6-MONTH OUTLOOK
• Expected growth rate: 2.2%
• Projected total trade: $7,641,817,188
• Year-over-year projection: 2.2% change
• Confidence level: HIGH (R² = 0.960, MAPE = 2.5%)
• ✓ Model shows strong predictive power - forecast is highly reliable

5. STRATEGIC RECOMMENDATIONS
• Focus on Nunavut as the primary growth region
• Prioritize Cocoa and Cocoa Preparations category for expansion
• Monitor Saskatchewan for emerging opportunities
• Prepare for 2.2% trade volume increase over next 6 months

📊 Forecast Details

  • Current 6-month average: $1,246,372,336
  • Forecasted 6-month average: $1,273,636,198
  • Year-over-year projected growth: 2.2%
  • 95% Confidence Interval: ±$62,561,089 per month

📊 Model Comparison

Model R² Score MAPE (%) RMSE (CAD $) Selected
Linear Regression 0.426 8.8% $119,911,609
Holt-Winters (Exp. Smoothing) 0.009 9.2% $157,624,577
Prophet (with linear growth) 0.960 2.5% $31,638,173 ✓

Prophet model selected for final forecast due to better performance metrics.

📚 Methodology & References

Data Sources

  • Statistics Canada - International Trade Database
  • Brazilian Ministry of Economy - Comex Stat
  • World Integrated Trade Solution (WITS)
  • International Monetary Fund - Direction of Trade Statistics

Methodology

  • Growth Rate Calculation: ((2025 Value - 2024 Value) / 2024 Value) × 100
  • Forecast Method: Prophet time series model with linear growth and additive seasonality. Model comparison performed between Linear Regression (R²=0.426) and Prophet (R²=0.960). Prophet selected for final forecast.
  • Market Share: (Provincial/Product Trade Value / Total Trade Value) × 100
  • Contribution Analysis: (Provincial Change / Total Change) × 100
  • Pareto Analysis: Identification of provinces contributing to 80% of growth
  • Seasonality: Monthly average decomposition to identify cyclical patterns

References

  • World Trade Organization. "International Trade Statistics". Geneva: WTO Publications.
  • Anderson, J.E. & van Wincoop, E. "Trade Costs and Trade Balance Dynamics". Journal of International Economics.
  • Statistics Canada. "Canadian International Merchandise Trade Database". Ottawa: Statistics Canada.
  • Brazilian Ministry of Economy. "Foreign Trade Statistics (Comex Stat)". Brasília: Ministry of Economy.

Technical Notes

  • All values are in Canadian Dollars (CAD), nominal terms (not adjusted for inflation)
  • Data includes merchandise trade only (services excluded)
  • HS Chapter classification based on Harmonized System 2022
  • Forecast confidence intervals assume normal distribution of residuals
  • Analysis period: 2024 - 2025
  • Generated: March 16, 2026
  • Report ID: CAN-BRA-20260316_221302
